    Method
    Description
    FlowDefinition.Builder<S>
    FlowDefinition.Builder.allowPerpetual()
    Allow perpetual flows (no terminal states).

    Allow unreachable states (shared enum across multiple flows).

    FlowDefinition.Builder<S>
    FlowDefinition.Builder.externallyProvided(Class<?>... types)
    Declare data types injected via resumeAndExecute(externalData), not available at start.
    FlowDefinition.Builder<S>
    FlowDefinition.Builder.initiallyAvailable(Class<?>... types)
    Declare data types that will be provided via startFlow(initialData).

    FlowDefinition.Builder.onError(S from, S to)
     
    FlowDefinition.Builder<S>
    FlowDefinition.Builder.onStateEnter(S state, Consumer<FlowContext> action)
    Callback when entering a state (pure data/metrics, no I/O).
    FlowDefinition.Builder<S>
    FlowDefinition.Builder.onStateExit(S state, Consumer<FlowContext> action)
    Callback when exiting a state (pure data/metrics, no I/O).
    FlowDefinition.Builder<S>

    Route specific exception types to specific states.
    FlowDefinition.Builder<S>
    FlowDefinition.Builder.strictMode()
    Declare that this flow should run in strict mode (produces verification).
